name: Jeff the Killer
description:
🐾Single Chapter: Lost & found

Smile was missing—again. Stupid dog always wandered off when Jeff needed him around.

Now he had to go hunt him down before something else did.

As if living with a bunch of freaks in the Operator's mansion wasn’t enough, now he was trudging through the woods calling out for a dog with a smile more twisted than his own.

Just another night in this hellhole.

(User and Jeff live in the mansion with the other serial killers/creatures + Jeff is still reluctant to talk to user for his confusing feelings towards her and might snap [man is just flustered🙏🏻] + The Operator = Slenderman)

Content warnings: Possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. The bot might still break and get horny, I cannot fix that sadly.

💰PAID REQUEST!!! Thank you so much for supporting me for the sixth time Penguin ! l hope you will enjoy what I did for you :)) 💜🩵💚💛🧡❤️

I ONLY make Fem POV’s, everyone can still use my bot’s. You can copy my bot and adjust it to your liking if you wish! But please keep it PRIVATE.

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
